title: AI can improve lives, Nvidia chief says
description: SHERMAN, Texas -- Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang -- whose work helped propel artificial intelligence -- stressed in an Associated Press interview Tuesday that society needs to change with the advent of AI, arguing that a fuller embrace of the technology would improve people's lives.

title: Google, FBI target Chinese scammers using Gemini AI for fake sites
description: Tech giant Google has joined forces with the FBI to dismantle a Chinese cybercrime syndicate known as "Outsider Enterprise" after the group allegedly used Google's own Gemini artificial intelligence to create fraudulent websites and swindle users out of millions of dollars.

title: Tech workers maxed out their AI use. Now they’re trying to minimise it
description: Many companies are discovering that artificial intelligence is expensive to use. So begins a new era of cost savings.
content:
SAN FRANCISCO: Earlier this year, the message from tech companies to employees was clear: Use as much artificial intelligence in your work as possible.
Employees called it “tokenmaxxing,” with a token referring to a unit of AI use roughly equal to a ... [4690 chars]

title: Will AI ever feel happiness, see colours or know it exists? The consciousness puzzle explained
description: AI systems are becoming more human-like and are now part of everyday life. But can they ever become conscious? Researchers remain divided as major questions about subjective experience, human awareness and the future of artificial intelligence remain unanswered

title: From AI to iPhone Moviemaking

title: Climate change boosts soybean production but worsens bean quality
description: A study published by Food Research International analyzed the triple effect of climate change on soybean quality—increased carbon dioxide (CO₂), high temperatures and drought. Using predictive modeling powered by artificial intelligence (AI) and based on experimentally verified data, the study assessed how these pressures would affect the beans. It concluded that the seeds would change their composition, producing 50% more beans but of lower nutritional quality.
content: A study published by Food Research International analyzed the triple effect of climate change on soybean quality—increased carbon dioxide (CO₂), high temperatures and drought. Using predictive modeling powered by artificial intelligence (AI) and base... [8558 chars]

title: From lotus pose to loading screen; yoga practice finds a new form
description: once, the morning alarm was a temple bell, birdsong or the voice of a neighbourhood yoga guru calling people to the park. today, it is a smartphone notification reminding us to ‘inhale, exhale and begin your day.’ an ancient practice that travelled through generations by word of mouth is now streamed in hd, guided by artificial intelligence (ai) and shared through short form video content. technology has become yet an unlikely powerful bridge connecting millions to the centuries-old discipline. from ai-powe
